author: ivre
description: Grab networking data from IVRE and bring it into your notes.

manifest.author: The IVRE contributors
manifest.description: IVRE integration for Obsidian: grab data from IVRE and brings it into Obsidian notes.
manifest.name: IVRE

name: IVRE

releases.author: p-l-
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Use built-in net module rather than ip-address-validator (fixes IPv6) by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/236
* CI: update Node & Python versions by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/520
* Switch to async calls to IVRE by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/530
* Support ASXXX elements by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/530

releases.author: p-l-
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add User-Agent and JA3 values by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/152
* Add SSH Host (public) keys by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/182


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/compare/1.3.0...1.3.1

releases.author: p-l-
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Use callouts for tags, add tag info lines by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/45
* Use callouts for IP data by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/46
* Re-create notes when they already exist by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/47
* Add a function to refresh notes from IVRE by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/49


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/compare/1.2.2...1.3.0

releases.author: p-l-
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Support screenshots from IVRE by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/38


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: p-l-
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Implement fixes proposed by @liamcain (@obsidianmd) by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/34


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: p-l-
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Implement fixes proposed by @liamcain (@obsidianmd) by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/30
* Avoid duplicates in networks by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/32

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

releases.author: p-l-
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Support MAC addresses by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/3
* Support parsing (again) links to IVRE namespace by @p-l- in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/18

## New Contributors
* @p-l- made their first contribution in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/1
* @dependabot made their first contribution in https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/pull/10

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0
